description: A subscriber on a standard plan wants to upgrade to a family plan to add their partner to the account.

nodes.task_description: Identify the subscriber and explain the features and cost of the family plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the benefits and new monthly price.

nodes.task_description: Process the plan upgrade on the primary account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully changes the subscription plan.

nodes.task_description: Send an invitation link to the partner's email address to join the family plan.
